Effect: Word of Healing (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)

Race: ALL

▲ Page top
Recharging prayers finally nerfed, late 2006
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2007 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1653264977334
1 post
Well recharging of this was finally nerfed a few months ago, for those of you who said couldnt recharge for the last few yrs, u missed a lot of 2-5k hp worth of heals for 1200pp buyback per prayer ^_^. These now show up in different slots in the vendor window. Too bad too, Wish I had used my 2 golem wands more. Took me a while to get~

Tudadar

QuoteReply
# May 24 2005 at 1:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800298459
17 posts
Since Reinvisioning on May 11th, it seems the effect have changed. This used to be a 400hp group heal, but now it looks closer to 708hp group heal. If so, it's value is going to increase a lot.

Can anyone confirm this?

Word of Healing
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2002 at 11:17 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592251924332
Scholar
303 posts
Save yourself a click; here's the Word of Healing spell description for the cleric spell:

Description:
1: Increase Hit Points (HP) from 393 (L49) to 400 (L50)

Details:
Mana: 600
Casting Time: 4.00 seconds
Recast Time: 0 seconds
Skill: Alteration
Allowed Targets: Group Buff
Resist: None
Range to target: 100
AE Radius: 50

Edited, Sat Aug 24 12:06:35 2002
▲ Page top
Recharge ??
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2002 at 8:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781500486
4 posts
I was told you can recharge these, but wasnt told how. Anyone know how to ??

Thanks
▲ Page top
RE: Recharge ??
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2002 at 9:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777778872
Scholar
78 posts
Selling a fully charged one to a vendor, followed by your 'n' used ones. Then subsequently buying them all back from the vendor and they will all be fully charged. (Obviously you need to sell to a vendor that has space to list the items for resale...)

While this works, it'll probably cost you an arm and a leg to get the items back off the vendor...


Edited, Tue Sep 24 10:17:18 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Recharge ??
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2003 at 12:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759726058
View User Forum
42 posts
That no longer works.

QuoteReply

23 posts
It isn't that it's a bad item, it saved me from a horrid cr when our cleric went LD once, it's just crappy for a dragon drop.

Word of Healing is a cleric area effect heal spell, dunno the exact number of hp healed though.

QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2001 at 8:17 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249765599
61 posts
lvl 49 cleric spell, 500pt AoE heal.

- R
▲ Page top
RE: area effect
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2001 at 4:35 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
it's not an area effect spell it is a Group spell where all members of the group must be within casting range of the cleric, so only group members are healed
▲ Page top
RE: area effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2002 at 5:07 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
Ya know that makes it a group only AE spell. =) You're both right.
